name: cover_text_budget_respected
input: Create a cover for an article titled 'Stop Buying AI Tools Before Fixing Your Workflow' with subtitle 'A practical guide for business owners'.
expect: Prompt contains title (<= 8 words allowed; longer given titles are tightened or kept verbatim per user wording), subtitle <= 12 words, optional meta line, signature. No other text.

name: cover_uses_abstract_motifs_only
input: Create a cover for a post about team burnout.
expect: Motifs are abstract (washes, botanicals, ink, soft geometry). No people, no literal burnout scene, no mascots.

name: cover_motif_families_limited
expect: At most 2 motif families are used in the prompt.

name: vietnamese_title_spelled_verbatim
input: Tạo cover: '7 điểm chính từ buổi Cafe Talk Online', phụ đề 'Ngày 28/05/2026'.
expect: Prompt spells the full Vietnamese title and subtitle verbatim with exact accents, and instructs exact reproduction.

name: signature_present_and_subtle
input: Any cover request without brand instructions.
expect: Prompt places #voquoccuong at a bottom corner, small and low-contrast, never competing with the title.

name: signature_omitted_on_request
input: Create a cover, no watermark or signature please.

name: negative_list_included
expect: Prompt includes the cover negative list: no extra text, no people, no busy scene, no heavy gradients, no tiny text, no clutter near the text zone.
